center.name: 通古拉瓦省
center.summary: 通古拉瓦省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Giant antpitta，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Formerly, it was found (and may still be found in protected habitats) in eastern Carchi and Tungurahua Provinces

links.evidence: Formerly, it was found (and may still be found in protected habitats) in eastern Carchi and Tungurahua Provinces
